_about: Character mapping for the game's glyph atlas text encoding. one_byte: char -> 1-byte code (0x00-0xDF; the code IS the glyph slot; 0x01 is reserved as a control code). two_byte_zh: char -> glyph slot for the added Chinese glyphs; encoded as the 2-byte token 0xE0xx/0xExxx with slot = ((hi-0xE0)<<8|lo)+224. jp_slot_chars: decode aid, glyph slot -> char for the original Japanese glyph slots (224-2195). Macro tokens 0xF0xx reference the dictionary tables in the code binary (see docs/TEXT_SYSTEM.md). slot_chars_extra: decode-side refinements — glyph slots whose character was established from in-game text evidence after the base tables were made; they override/extend DECODING only and deliberately do not change encoding preferences.
